sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58550" key="kolaki/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολᾰκ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κόλαξ</foreign>; then, <sense id="n58550.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κλιμακίς</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.50d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
